app.name: Funduqii
app.foundationReady: The Funduqii platform foundation is ready.

auth.forbiddenNotOwner: This console is for platform owners only.
auth.genericError: Could not sign in. Please try again.
auth.asideHeadline: Run every hotel from one refined console.
auth.asideSubtitle: Funduqii is the operating system for modern hospitality — subscriptions, tenants, and platform control in one place.
auth.noHotelAccess: This account has no active hotel access.

settings.title: Hotel settings
settings.subtitle: Your hotel's identity, contact, location, policies and media
settings.readOnlySuspended: This hotel is suspended — settings are read-only.
settings.sectionContactDesc: Ways guests and the platform reach the hotel.
settings.sectionLocationDesc: Where the hotel is. Map fields are stored only.
settings.sectionDefaultsDesc: Preferences saved now, applied in later phases.
settings.mapsFieldsHint: Stored as values only — no live map or geocoding yet.
settings.defaultsHint: These are saved preferences; no bookings or public site are built here.
settings.logoHint: PNG, JPG or WebP · up to 1 MB · one active logo.
settings.coverHint: PNG, JPG or WebP · up to 5 MB · one active cover.
settings.galleryHint: PNG, JPG or WebP · up to 5 MB each · up to 10 images.
settings.galleryEmptyHint: Upload images to showcase the hotel.
settings.deleteImageBody: The image will be permanently removed.
settings.fileTypeError: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPG or WebP.
settings.sectionPublicDesc: How this hotel appears on the public Funduqii site and how visitors book.
settings.publicListed: List the hotel on the public website
settings.publicSlugHint: Latin letters, numbers and dashes — e.g. grand-hotel. The public page is /hotels/<slug>.
settings.publicTermsHint: Shown to visitors before they book.
settings.hkInspectionRequiredHint: When enabled: a worker completing a task moves it to awaiting inspection, and the room only becomes ready after a supervisor approves it.

floors.name: Name
floors.emptyHint: Add a floor to start organizing rooms.
floors.deleteBody: Floors with rooms cannot be deleted — deactivate instead.

types.name: Name
types.emptyHint: Define the types of rooms this hotel offers.
types.deleteBody: Types used by rooms cannot be deleted — deactivate instead.
types.publicNameHint: Leave empty to use the internal name.
types.publicPriceHint: Leave empty to use the base rate.

list.statusNoteHint: Required for maintenance / out of service.
list.emptyHint: Add rooms to this hotel to get started.
list.deleteBody: The room will be permanently removed.

errors.inUse: This item is in use and cannot be deleted; deactivate it instead.
errors.crossTenant: The selected floor or room type belongs to another hotel.
errors.noteRequired: A note is required for this status change.

board.emptyFiltered: No rooms match the current filters.
board.setupHint: Add a floor and a room type before creating rooms.
board.duplicateRooms: Duplicate rooms will not be created
board.bulkTooBig: Range too large — at most {max} rooms at a time.
board.roomTypesHint: The hotel's room-type catalog — you pick from these types when creating rooms.
board.typeInUseHint: This type is used by rooms — disable it instead of deleting.
board.floorsReduceHint: You cannot reduce the count below the highest used floor.
board.floorsReduceBlocked: You cannot reduce floor count because rooms exist on a higher floor.
board.fromTypeHint: Read automatically from the room type.
board.dirtyLine: Needs cleaning before it can be offered
board.oosLine: Out of service at the moment
board.typeInUseMessage: Cannot delete a room type that is in use

availability.title: Check availability
availability.emptyHint: Availability is calculated from your rooms and current bookings.

reasons.no_bookable_rooms: No bookable rooms of this type
reasons.insufficient_rooms: Not enough rooms for the requested quantity

list.title: Reservations
list.emptyHint: Create a reservation to see it here.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, guest or phone

form.name: Guest name
form.availabilityHint: Availability is re-checked on the server before saving.
form.roomHint: Pin a specific room, or leave as any.
form.instantHint: Starts today — the check-in date is set to today.
form.availabilityConflict: Not enough rooms for these dates — only {count} available.
form.expectedPaymentHint: Informational only — no payment is taken.
form.reviewHint: Check the details above, then save.

details.title: Reservation
details.publicCancelRequested: The guest requested cancellation via the public website

cancelDialog.title: Cancel reservation
cancelDialog.body: This releases the rooms back to availability. This cannot be undone.
cancelDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this reservation being cancelled?

confirmDialog.title: Confirm reservation
confirmDialog.body: Availability will be re-checked before confirming.

errors.noAvailability: Not enough rooms are available for the selected dates.
errors.invalidTransition: This reservation status change is not allowed.
errors.roomConflict: This room is already assigned for the selected dates.

views.subtitle: Manage manual bookings, website reservations and upcoming stays-to-be.
views.searchPlaceholder: Reservation no, guest name, phone, room number…
views.instantDesc: Create a reservation and check the guest in directly from reception.
views.futureDesc: Create a reservation for a future arrival date.
views.emptyFiltered: No reservations match the current filters.
views.successCheckedIn: Reservation created and guest checked in successfully
views.checkinFailed: Reservation was created, but check-in failed
views.existingGuestHintInstant: Pick a registered guest or enter their details — used for the immediate check-in.
views.companionsHint: Companion names are attached at check-in, in the front desk.
views.documentsHint: Optional step — stored with the reservation details.
views.roomRequiredInstant: Pick a specific room for the immediate reservation.
views.inHouseFrozen: Dates and rooms of a checked-in reservation cannot be changed. Make the change from the front desk.
views.inHouseNoCancel: A reservation with an in-house stay cannot be cancelled.

guests.title: Guests
guests.subtitle: Guest directory

list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or document
list.name: Name

guests.deleteBody: A guest linked to a stay is deactivated instead of deleted.

directory.emptyHint: Every guest with at least one stay — current or past — appears here.

block.title: Block guest
block.scopeNote: The block applies inside THIS hotel only and prevents bookings and check-in until lifted.
block.activeNotice: This guest is blocked in this hotel

deleteResult.deactivated: Profile deactivated only — history is preserved.

errors.blocked: This guest is blocked in this hotel — the operation cannot proceed.

arrivals.emptyHint: Confirmed reservations arriving today appear here.

current.emptyHint: Guests you check in appear here.

departures.emptyHint: In-house stays leaving today appear here.

checkInModal.title: Check in
checkInModal.roomRequired: Choose a room to check into.
checkInModal.noRooms: No available rooms of this type.

checkOutModal.title: Check out
checkOutModal.body: Confirm the guest is leaving. This frees the room (it becomes dirty for housekeeping).
checkOutModal.financeNote: Charges and payments are settled in Finance — check-out requires a zero folio balance.
checkOutModal.folioNone: This stay has no open folio.
checkOutModal.folioBlocked: Check-out is blocked while the folio has an unsettled balance. Settle it in Finance first.
checkOutModal.earlyDeparture: Early departure — the expected check-out date has not arrived. A reason is required.

errors.invalidCheckIn: This reservation cannot be checked in.
errors.invalidCheckOut: This stay cannot be checked out.
errors.roomNotReady: This room is not ready for check-in.
errors.alreadyCheckedIn: This reservation room is already checked in.
errors.lineFull: Every booked room of this reservation is already checked in — the booked quantity cannot be exceeded.
errors.arrivalFuture: This reservation's arrival date has not been reached yet (hotel business date).
errors.invalidStayChange: This stay change is not allowed.
errors.folioOutstanding: The folio has an unsettled balance — settle it in Finance before check-out.

workflow.checkInDesc: Check an arriving guest into a room.
workflow.checkOutDesc: Check out a departing guest and free the room.

shortenModal.title: Shorten stay
shortenModal.chargesWarning: Shortening the stay never deletes charges automatically — any financial correction happens in Finance.

moveModal.title: Move room
moveModal.noRooms: No ready, available rooms to move into right now.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Folios, payments, invoices and expenses

overview.foreignCurrencyWarning: {count} open folios in other currencies ({currencies}) are excluded from the outstanding balance.

folios.emptyHint: Open a folio to record charges and payments.

paymentForm.title: Record payment
paymentForm.mixedHint: To pay with more than one method, record multiple payments.

finance.financeNote: All amounts are recorded internally only — no real payment is processed.

errors.folioClosed: This folio is closed or voided and cannot be modified.
errors.folioNotBalanced: A folio can only be closed when its balance is zero.
errors.voidReasonRequired: A reason is required to void this record.
errors.invalidOperation: This financial operation is not allowed.
errors.voidWindowClosed: This record's business day has been closed — post an adjustment (for charges) or a payment reversal instead of voiding.
errors.voidWindowOpen: This record's business day is still open — void it instead.
errors.folioHasPostings: A folio with charges, payments or invoices cannot be voided — close it instead.
errors.chargeAlreadyAdjusted: This charge already has a posted adjustment.
errors.paymentAlreadyReversed: This payment already has a posted reversal.
errors.reservationFolioNotSupported: A folio cannot be linked to a reservation without a stay.
errors.activeInvoiceExists: An issued invoice already exists for this folio — void it before issuing a new one.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Restaurant, café and room-service orders that post to the guest folio.

overview.notPostedHint: Delivered orders not yet posted to a folio.

catalog.emptyCategoriesHint: Create sections like restaurant, café or room service.
catalog.emptyItemsHint: Add your menu items and services with prices.
catalog.deleteConfirmCategory: Delete this category? Categories with items cannot be deleted.
catalog.deleteConfirmItem: Delete this item? Items used in orders cannot be deleted — deactivate them instead.

orders.emptyHint: Create a service order for a room or a walk-in guest.
orders.totalAfterSave: Totals are calculated by the system after saving.
orders.postConfirmBody: The order total will be added to the guest folio as one charge. This can only happen once.
orders.postHint: This order is delivered and not posted yet — post it to the guest folio from here.

board.hint: New orders appear here as they are submitted.

errors.alreadyPosted: This order has already been posted to a folio.
errors.notPostable: This order cannot be posted — it must be delivered and linked to a stay or folio.
errors.notEditable: This order can no longer be modified.
errors.itemsRequired: Add at least one item to the order.
errors.invalidTransition: This status change is not allowed.
errors.itemUnavailable: One of the selected items is inactive or unavailable.

operations.title: Operations
operations.subtitle: Housekeeping, maintenance and lost & found for your rooms.

overview.roomsUnderMaintenanceHint: Rooms blocked as maintenance or out of service.
overview.lostFoundOpenHint: Found or stored items awaiting their owner.
overview.urgentTasksHint: Urgent housekeeping and maintenance still active.

hk.title: Housekeeping tasks
hk.completeHint: Choose what happens to the room. It can only be made available when no maintenance blocks it.
hk.emptyHint: Create a cleaning task or check out a stay to get one automatically.
hk.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, room or notes…

mt.title: Maintenance requests
mt.closeHint: The room is never released automatically — choose its next status explicitly.
mt.emptyHint: Report an issue to open the first request.
mt.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, title or room…

lf.title: Lost & found
lf.claimHint: Record who claims this item (name or linked guest).
lf.returnHint: The item is handed over. A claimant name or linked guest is required.
lf.emptyHint: Register a found item to start the log.
lf.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, item or location…

board.title: Room status board
board.hint: Rooms grouped by their operational status. Occupancy is shown from in-house stays, never as a room status.
board.emptyHint: Create rooms first from the Rooms section.
board.arrivalsNotReadyCount: Rooms with today's arrivals not ready

errors.invalidTransition: This status change is not allowed.
errors.notEditable: This record can no longer be modified.
errors.roomBlocked: This room is blocked by maintenance and cannot be made available.
errors.claimantRequired: A claimant name (or linked guest) is required.
errors.disposalReasonRequired: A reason is required to dispose of this item.
errors.duplicateActive: This room already has an active cleaning task — complete or cancel it first.
errors.inspectionReasonRequired: An inspection rejection reason is required.

staff.title: Staff & permissions
staff.subtitle: Manage your hotel team and their flexible permission grants.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.hint: You do not have permission to view this page. Ask a manager to grant you access.

overview.totalHint: Everyone ever added to this hotel.
overview.activeHint: Members who can work right now.
overview.managersHint: Hold every hotel permission by type.
overview.withPermissionsHint: Active staff holding at least one grant.
overview.withoutPermissionsHint: Active staff with no grants yet — they can sign in but do nothing.

list.title: Staff members
list.name: Name
list.deactivateWarning: A deactivated member keeps their history but can no longer work in this hotel.
list.resetHint: Hand the new password to the employee outside the system. It is never shown again.
list.emptyHint: Add your first staff member to get started.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, phone, title or code…

form.jobTitleHint: A label like “Receptionist” — it never grants any access.
form.tempPasswordHint: Delivered to the employee outside the system; never shown again.
form.initialPermissionsHint: You can adjust them any time from the permissions matrix.
form.passwordRequired: A password of at least 8 characters is required.

matrix.title: Permissions matrix
matrix.hint: Grants are the single source of truth for access. Grouped by section; changes apply only when you save.
matrix.noStaff: No active staff to manage yet.
matrix.managerAll: This member is a manager and already holds every hotel permission — grants are not editable.
matrix.selfWarning: You are editing YOUR OWN permissions. Removing view permissions may lock you out of pages immediately.
matrix.inactiveNote: This member is deactivated; permissions remain stored but have no effect until reactivation.

registry.title: Permission reference
registry.hint: What every section and operation means.
registry.jobTitleNote: Job titles are descriptive labels only — they NEVER grant or restrict access.
registry.sourceOfTruth: Access = membership in this hotel + explicit permission grants. A manager holds every permission by membership type.

errors.emailExists: A user with this email already exists — use “Link existing user” instead.
errors.membershipExists: This user is already a member of this hotel.
errors.lastManager: The hotel's last active manager cannot be deactivated.
errors.platformOwner: A platform owner account cannot be managed as hotel staff.
errors.escalationBlocked: You cannot grant a permission you do not hold yourself.
errors.managerNotEditable: A manager already holds every permission; grants are not editable.
errors.unknownPermission: One of the permissions is not recognized.

shifts.title: Shifts & daily close
shifts.subtitle: Open and close working shifts, hand them over, and close the business day.

overview.cashExpectedHint: Opening floats plus cash in, minus cash out.
overview.cashActualHint: Sum counted in today's closed shifts.
overview.unassignedHint: Today's payments/expenses recorded outside any shift.

current.title: My current shift
current.noneHint: Open a shift to start tracking your cash drawer.

form.closeHint: Count the drawer and enter the actual amount. A difference from the expected amount requires a reason.

list.title: Shifts
list.emptyHint: Open the first shift to start.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, person or notes…

ho.title: Shift handovers
ho.acceptBody: You take over the pending items listed in this handover.
ho.emptyHint: Create a handover to pass a shift to a colleague.

dc.title: Daily close
dc.closeWarning: Closing this date blocks NEW payments, expenses, service postings and shifts dated to it. Existing records are never changed; finance voids stay possible with a reason.
dc.emptyHint: Prepare a snapshot, review it, then close the day.

errors.alreadyOpen: You already have an open shift.
errors.notOpen: This operation requires an open shift.
errors.differenceReason: A reason is required when the counted cash differs from the expected amount.
errors.notRecipient: Only the designated recipient (or a manager) can act on this handover.
errors.rejectionReason: A reason is required to reject this handover.
errors.dayClosed: This business date has been closed; new dated activity is not allowed.
errors.dayAlreadyClosed: This business date is already closed.
errors.openShifts: The day cannot be closed while shifts for this date are still open.
errors.pendingHandovers: The day cannot be closed while submitted handovers are unresolved.

reports.title: Reports & analytics
reports.subtitle: Operational insight across bookings, occupancy, money, services, operations and shifts.

overview.netHint: Payments minus expenses — an operational figure, not profit.
overview.servicesHint: Orders in the range and totals posted to folios.
overview.shiftsHint: Current open shifts and closed business days in range.

occupancy.note: Occupancy is derived from stays; a room never has an 'occupied' manual status.

finance.disclaimer: These are operational figures, not a final accounting report.

notifications.title: Notifications & activity
notifications.subtitle: What needs your attention inside this hotel — no external channels.

footer.tagline: Hotel management platform — online booking without accounts.

home.heroSubtitle: Browse published hotels, check live availability, and book in minutes — no account needed.
home.feature2: Instant booking request with a reference number
home.feature3: Manage your booking with a secure code — no account

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.subtitle: All hotels published on Funduqii
hotels.searchPlaceholder: Search by hotel name or city…

hotel.noRoomTypes: No rooms are published for this hotel yet.
hotel.notFoundHint: This hotel is not available on the public site.

booking.title: Book your stay
booking.unavailable: No rooms are available for these dates.
booking.acceptTerms: I agree to the hotel's booking terms and cancellation policy.
booking.confirmationNote: Your booking is held until the hotel confirms it. You get a reference number right away.
booking.instantNote: Your booking is confirmed immediately with a reference number.
booking.closed: Online booking is currently unavailable for this hotel.
booking.successHeld: Your booking is awaiting the hotel's confirmation.
booking.tokenWarning: Save this code now — it is shown only once and is the only way to manage your booking.

manage.title: Manage my booking
manage.subtitle: Enter your booking reference and the manage code you received when booking.
manage.tokenHint: The code shown once when you completed the booking.
manage.notFoundError: No booking matches this reference and code.
manage.cancelNote: This sends a cancellation request to the hotel — the hotel processes it according to its policy.
manage.cancelRequested: A cancellation request has been sent to the hotel.

subscriptionState.suspended: This hotel is suspended by the platform. Data is read-only; contact the platform owner.
subscriptionState.expired: The hotel's subscription has ended. Important operations are restricted until the platform owner activates a subscription — no data is lost.
subscriptionState.expiringSoon: The hotel's subscription ends in {days} days. Contact the platform owner to renew.
subscriptionState.blockedError: This operation is unavailable: the hotel has no active subscription. Contact the platform owner.

hotelSubscription.title: Subscription & Plans
hotelSubscription.subtitle: The hotel's current subscription and plan — read-only.
hotelSubscription.managedByPlatform: Plans, activation and renewals are managed by the platform administration only.
hotelSubscription.noSubscription: This hotel has no active subscription at the moment.
hotelSubscription.contactOwner: To activate, renew or change the plan, please contact the Funduqii platform administration — there is no online payment inside the console.

publicSiteAdmin.title: Public website
publicSiteAdmin.subtitle: Control the public site's header, hero, contact info and footer. Empty label overrides fall back to the built-in translations.
publicSiteAdmin.sectionHeaderDesc: Choose which links and buttons visitors see, and optionally override their labels per language.
publicSiteAdmin.sectionHeroDesc: The main title, subtitle and buttons on the public home page.
publicSiteAdmin.urlHint: Internal path (/...) or a full http(s) link.
publicSiteAdmin.sectionContactDesc: Shown publicly in the site footer.
publicSiteAdmin.sectionFooterDesc: The short text under the platform name.
publicSiteAdmin.overrideHint: Leave empty to use the built-in translation.

states.emptyHint: Items you create will appear here.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Platform overview
dashboard.welcomeHint: Here's what's happening across your platform today.

captions.trialHotels: Hotels with a running free trial
captions.paidHotels: Hotels with an active paid subscription
captions.publicListed: Active hotels listed on the public site

dashboard.revenueHint: An administrative estimate from manually activated subscriptions (yearly plans normalized to monthly). Not profit and not a legal financial report.

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.subtitle: Manage hotels as tenants
hotels.name: Name
hotels.emptyHint: Add your first hotel to get started.
hotels.suspendBody: Suspension blocks the hotel's important operations and hides it from the public site. No data is deleted.
hotels.invalidStatusTransition: This hotel status change is not allowed.
hotels.subscriptionSectionDesc: The hotel's current subscription, lifecycle actions and preserved history. Paid activation is manual — there is no payment gateway.

plans.title: Subscription plans
plans.subtitle: Packages offered to hotels
plans.name: Name
plans.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently removes the plan. Plans in use cannot be deleted.
plans.inUseCannotDelete: This plan is in use and cannot be deleted.
plans.priceYearlyHint: Optional — shown alongside the base price.
plans.notesHint: Visible to the platform owner only.

subscriptions.title: Hotel subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Trials and paid subscriptions
subscriptions.cancelConfirmBody: The subscription will be cancelled immediately.
subscriptions.trialAlreadyUsed: This hotel has already used its one-time free trial.
subscriptions.conflict: This hotel already has an active subscription.
subscriptions.emptyHint: Assign a plan to a hotel to create one.
subscriptions.trialAlreadyUsedHint: This hotel already used its one-time free trial.

errors.trialAlreadyUsed: The free trial can only be granted once, as the hotel's first subscription.
errors.conflicting: This hotel already has an active subscription.
errors.invalidTransition: This subscription action is not allowed in the current state.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Basic platform configuration
settings.descGeneral: Your platform's name and public website address.
settings.descSupport: How hotels reach you for help.
settings.descDefaults: Defaults applied when creating hotels and trials.
settings.descSwitches: Reserved controls, enforced in later phases.
settings.switchesHint: Reserved switches — enforced in later phases.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do this.
errors.conflict: This action conflicts with the current state.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

hotelDashboard.title: Dashboard
hotelDashboard.subtitle: A quick look at your hotel today
